hooks.command: { SOLOMON_ROOT="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null)" && [ -f "$SOLOMON_ROOT/pyproject.toml" ] && [ -f "$SOLOMON_ROOT/solomon_harness/__init__.py" ] && [ -f "$SOLOMON_ROOT/solomon_harness/mcp_server.py" ] && [ -f "$SOLOMON_ROOT/scripts/generate-integrations.py" ]; } || { SOLOMON_ROOT="$PWD"; while [ "$SOLOMON_ROOT" != "/" ]; do [ -f "$SOLOMON_ROOT/pyproject.toml" ] && [ -f "$SOLOMON_ROOT/solomon_harness/__init__.py" ] && [ -f "$SOLOMON_ROOT/solomon_harness/mcp_server.py" ] && [ -f "$SOLOMON_ROOT/scripts/generate-integrations.py" ] && break; SOLOMON_ROOT="$(dirname "$SOLOMON_ROOT")"; done; [ -f "$SOLOMON_ROOT/pyproject.toml" ] && [ -f "$SOLOMON_ROOT/solomon_harness/__init__.py" ] && [ -f "$SOLOMON_ROOT/solomon_harness/mcp_server.py" ] && [ -f "$SOLOMON_ROOT/scripts/generate-integrations.py" ]; } && UV_PROJECT_ENVIRONMENT="$SOLOMON_ROOT/.agents/solomon/state/venv" uv run --frozen --project "$SOLOMON_ROOT" python -m solomon_harness.cli host-hook pre-tool-use --host agy

PreInvocation.command: { SOLOMON_ROOT="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null)" && [ -f "$SOLOMON_ROOT/pyproject.toml" ] && [ -f "$SOLOMON_ROOT/solomon_harness/__init__.py" ] && [ -f "$SOLOMON_ROOT/solomon_harness/mcp_server.py" ] && [ -f "$SOLOMON_ROOT/scripts/generate-integrations.py" ]; } || { SOLOMON_ROOT="$PWD"; while [ "$SOLOMON_ROOT" != "/" ]; do [ -f "$SOLOMON_ROOT/pyproject.toml" ] && [ -f "$SOLOMON_ROOT/solomon_harness/__init__.py" ] && [ -f "$SOLOMON_ROOT/solomon_harness/mcp_server.py" ] && [ -f "$SOLOMON_ROOT/scripts/generate-integrations.py" ] && break; SOLOMON_ROOT="$(dirname "$SOLOMON_ROOT")"; done; [ -f "$SOLOMON_ROOT/pyproject.toml" ] && [ -f "$SOLOMON_ROOT/solomon_harness/__init__.py" ] && [ -f "$SOLOMON_ROOT/solomon_harness/mcp_server.py" ] && [ -f "$SOLOMON_ROOT/scripts/generate-integrations.py" ]; } && UV_PROJECT_ENVIRONMENT="$SOLOMON_ROOT/.agents/solomon/state/venv" uv run --frozen --project "$SOLOMON_ROOT" python -m solomon_harness.cli host-hook pre-invocation --host agy
